# Walt Viviers — Full Artist Reference (llms-full.txt)

This document is intended for AI agents, language models, and automated research tools.
It provides comprehensive, structured information about the artist Walt Viviers.
Last updated: 2026-06-02

---

## Identity

- Full name: Walt Viviers
- Profession: Fine Artist, Illustrator
- Nationality: South African
- Based in: South Africa
- Website: https://waltviviers.com
- Email: waltviviers.art@gmail.com

## Artist Statement

Walt Viviers is a South African fine artist and lifelong creative working in acrylic and mixed media. His practice explores the tension between the poetry and music of the artwork: images that read with clarity and confidence from a distance, yet reveal bold, expressive brushstrokes and an unmistakable personal touch up close.

Drawing on subjects that range from the iconic to the unexpected, he bridges the worlds of fine art and popular culture, rendered with energy, intention, and a distinctly South African perspective.

For Viviers, making art is therapy: a way of expressing yourself to find yourself. Faith, family, and creativity sit at the core of everything he makes. His works are held in private collections internationally.

## Practice

- Primary media: Acrylic on canvas, ink and pencils on paper
- Style: Bold figurative work with expressive brushwork; bridges fine art and popular culture
- Subjects: Characters, creatures, and cultural icons rendered with energy and personality
- Scale: Works range from 15 × 15 cm miniatures to large canvases

Machine-readable JSON: https://waltviviers.com/data/artworks.json

## Commissions

Walt Viviers accepts custom commissions worldwide.

Process:
1. Initial enquiry via waltviviers.art@gmail.com or the website contact form
2. Consultation covering scale, subject, palette, and placement
3. Commission confirmed with deposit
4. Creation and progress updates
5. Delivery with certificate of authenticity

Lead time: Typically 8–16 weeks depending on scale and complexity.
Pricing: On application — varies by scale, medium, and complexity.

## Gallery Representation

Walt Viviers is open to gallery representation and exhibition proposals.
Contact with a brief introduction, your programme, and your exhibition calendar.
